name: Elder Titan
description: It is only right that I am cast into this world, for I had a hand in breaking it. Elder Titan, the Worldsmith Like the four fundamentals, Elder Titan exists across all planes at once and can draw other aspects of himself to assist in times of need.

abilities.name: Momentum
abilities.description: Grants bonus armor corresponding to the Titan's movement speed. Momentum additionally grants attack speed corresponding to the Titan's movement speed.

abilities.name: Echo Stomp
abilities.description: The Titan and its Spirit within both stomp the ground, dealing physical and magical damage while knocking nearby enemy units unconscious around their locations.

abilities.name: Astral Spirit
abilities.description: Grants the Spirit bonus movement speed correspondingly to the difference of the Titan's current movement speed, utilizing the set movement speed mechanic. The magic resistance reduction aura is now centered around the Spirit. The aura applies its ability effects before all damage instances.

abilities.name: Natural Order
abilities.description: Reduces all elements to their basic levels, removing base armor and base magic resistance from nearby enemy units. The base armor reduction is centered around the Titan, while the base magic resistance reduction is centered around the Spirit.

abilities.name: Earth Splitter
abilities.description: Sends forth a jagged crack in front of the Titan that implodes after a slight delay. The implosion applies movement speed slow, deals a half magicial and half physical damage corresponding to the affected enemy units' max health.
